title: Vanilla Armors Reforged
description: Changes the armors to various medieval armors, with a fantasy feel
body:
Replaces the textures of all six armor sets to medieval fantasy themed armor. Each armor set is inspired by different civilizations. 

The texture pack is still W.I.P.

****

**There are 2 versions of the texture pack:**
- **Default**: No mods required. Only the armor textures change, the Coast Armor Trim is the only armor trim available.
  
<details>
<summary>Default Texture Pack</summary>

![All armor sets are displayed in a small room](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e9a20adf19e7b8600207e758d326f36519a5dd4c.png)

</details>


  
- **3D**: Requires EMF. Models and textures are changed. Supports Wide and Slim arms. Armor Trims are unsupported.

  
<details>
<summary>3D Texture Pack</summary>

![All armor sets are displayed in a small room](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41f7d5165c5f08c671886cffb42376b33ff229e0.png)

</details>
